notes: Mistral's 22B code-generation model (released May 2024) with a fill-in-the-middle endpoint, widely used in IDE autocomplete (Continue.dev, Tabnine). The name is reported to be inspired by "orchestral" (the model harmonizing coding tasks), blended with "code" + the company name "Mistral." STRESS: koh-DESS-truhl ‚Äî primary stress on the second syllable, by analogy with orchestral (or-KESS-truhl). A code-forward first-syllable reading KOH-duh-struhl (keeping the embedded "code" audible, echoing MISS-truhl) is also heard. Official docs give no phonetic guidance.
